Buyer's question

The AI Tool Stack for a 30-Person Company Less than you think.

A common question from CEOs of 20-50 person B2B companies in 2026: what AI tools do we actually need? This is the honest answer — short list, clear reasoning, no kickbacks. Most companies overspend on AI tooling by 3-5x.

Short answer

One LLM platform (Claude Team or ChatGPT Team) + your existing CRM and email + a meeting transcription tool. Total monthly cost ~$1,200-$2,500 for a 30-person team. Everything else is usually a wrap or duplication.

By Bill Colbert · Founder, Treetop Growth Strategy
Published May 2026 · More from the library

The recommended stack

  1. Claude Team or ChatGPT Team — \$30/user/month. Seats for everyone in workflows that benefit, not just leadership.
  2. Your existing CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive) with whatever AI features it has — already paid for.
  3. Your existing email/calendar (Google Workspace or Microsoft 365) with built-in AI — already paid for.
  4. One meeting transcription tool (Fathom, Otter, Granola, or Gong if you have it) — \$15-\$40/user/month.
  5. That's the stack. Total monthly for 30 people: roughly \$1,200-\$2,500.

What you don't need (yet)

  • AI SDR tools. Outbound AI agents perform poorly in 2026 (see state of B2B sales).
  • AI content marketing platforms. Claude/ChatGPT does this for you.
  • AI customer service platforms beyond your existing helpdesk. Use AI features in Gorgias/Front/Zendesk.
  • AI sales coaching tools. Mature products are expensive (\$50-\$100/user/month) and adoption is hard; usually not worth it at this size.
  • AI proposal/RFP platforms. Claude Project + your past proposals does the same thing for free.
  • Multiple LLM platforms. Pick one. Add the second later if needed.

What might be worth adding by 50 people

  • Conversation intelligence (Gong, Chorus) if sales motion is heavy.
  • Customer success platform with AI (Vitally, Catalyst) if you have a CS team.
  • Marketing automation with strong AI (HubSpot/Marketo enhanced) if marketing is the growth engine.
  • Specialized vertical tool if you operate in a vertical where the AI integration is genuinely differentiated.

Total cost benchmarks

FAQ

Should I pick Claude or ChatGPT?

Default to Claude for most B2B workflows; ChatGPT if Microsoft-heavy. See our 2026 comparison.

Do I need both Team-tier AI and individual Pro subscriptions?

No. Team tier covers what Pro covers for business workflows. Consolidate.

Do I need a vector database or RAG system?

No, at 30 people, almost certainly not. Claude Projects with loaded knowledge handles your knowledge needs.

What about agents and orchestration tools?

Skip. At this size, you do not need orchestration. Build workflows in Projects.

Should I buy AI tools from my existing vendors?

Often yes — your CRM and email already include AI features. Use what you have before buying more.
